name: Madana Phala
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Kapha and Vata.
mainMedicinalUses: Primary drug for Vamana (therapeutic vomiting) therapy.
Used in chronic asthma and respiratory congestion.
plantProfile: The best emetic agent in Ayurveda.
preparationMethods: Milk or water paste for Vamana.
safetyProfile: Only use under strictly clinical Ayurvedic supervision.
